LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF KATHRYN ZUSCHIN'S RENEWED MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS. THE COURT HAD AN OPPORTUNITY TO READ AND CONSIDER PLAINTIFF'S REPLY BRIEF, FILED DECEMBER 16, 2011. AS SUCH, PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE OF THE HEARING ON THE MOTION (E-MAILED TO THE CLERK OF DEPARTMENT 302), IN ORDER TO GIVE THE COURT TIME TO READ THE REPLY B RIEF, IS DENIED. THE RENEWED MOTION IS DENIED. THE COURT GRANTED PLAINTIFF'S PREVIOUS MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS ON OCTOBER 2, 2011. PLAINTIFF IS NOT ENTITLED TO RELIEF UNDER CCP 1008. The Court had an opportunity to read and consider Plaintiff's Reply brief, filed December 16, 2011. As such, Plaintiff's request for continuance of the hearing on the motion (e-mailed to the Clerk of Department 302), in order to give the Court time to read the Reply b rief, is denied.
